#!/bin/bash

# Color Palette — Kanagawa Wave
# (matches kitty and neovim theme)
export BLACK=0xff1F1F28
export WHITE=0xffDCD7BA
export RED=0xffC34043
export GREEN=0xff76946A
export BLUE=0xff7E9CD8
export YELLOW=0xffC0A36E
export ORANGE=0xffFFA066
export MAGENTA=0xff957FB8
export GREY=0xff727169
export TRANSPARENT=0x00000000
export CYAN=0xff6A9589

# General bar colors
export BAR_COLOR=0xa01F1F28
export ICON_COLOR=$WHITE # Color of all icons
export LABEL_COLOR=$WHITE # Color of all labels
export BACKGROUND_1=0x9016161D
export BACKGROUND_2=0x902A2A37

export POPUP_BACKGROUND_COLOR=0xff16161D
export POPUP_BORDER_COLOR=$WHITE

export SHADOW_COLOR=$BLACK
